lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in good condition. The interior and exterior show minor signs of wear. All mechanical and electrical systems are in good working order and have been well-maintained.
The car is in good condition. It shows minor signs of use on both the exterior and interior, but has no major damage. It is mechanically reliable and has been well-maintained.
This car is in fair condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is, ideally for parts or as a significant restoration project. It currently suffers from major mechanical issues, including a transmission that slips and an engine that requires immediate attention. The exterior has extensive rust damage, particularly along the rocker panels, and the paint is peeling. Inside, the cabin shows heavy wear with torn seats and several non-functional electrical components. It will likely need to be towed from its current location.

Ready for a new chapter? This car is the ultimate opportunity for someone who loves a hands-on project! While it's currently in poor condition and will need significant mechanical and cosmetic attention to get it back to its best, it's priced to move and full of potential for the right owner. It's a fantastic, budget-friendly way to get into a vehicle you can truly make your own!

This vehicle is in exceptional, mint condition, presenting exactly as it did when it first left the showroom. The exterior is absolutely flawless, with original paint that retains a deep, mirror-like shine and is entirely free of scratches, dents, or rock chips. Inside, the cabin is pristine; the upholstery shows no signs of wear, the carpets are spotless, and the interior still retains a fresh feel. Mechanically, the car is in perfect working order, having been meticulously maintained with a documented service history. Every electronic feature and luxury amenity functions perfectly. This is a rare find for a buyer seeking a vehicle in truly collector-grade condition that offers a like-new driving experience.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of exemplary caliber, maintained to the highest standards of automotive preservation. This specimen exhibits an immaculate exterior finish paired with a pristine cabin environment, reflecting a history of fastidious care and minimal usage. Its mechanical integrity is beyond reproach, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from its inaugural delivery. For the discerning enthusiast who demands uncompromising quality, this vehicle represents a premier acquisition opportunity.

Hey there! I'm selling my absolute pride and joy. This car is in stunning, like-new condition—seriously, it looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It's been pampered since day one, kept in a climate-controlled garage, and drives like a total dream. You won't find another one this clean. Come check it out and fall in love!

This E46 M3 is a superlative example of the S54-powered icon. Featuring the high-revving 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six with individual throttle bodies and double-VANOS, this unit delivers linear power delivery up to its 8,000 RPM redline. The Getrag 6-speed manual transmission provides tactile engagement, paired with a factory limited-slip differential for optimal torque vectoring. The chassis is structurally sound with documented subframe reinforcement and pristine Alpine White paint. Mechanically flawless, the suspension retains factory compliance with refreshed bushings and Bilstein
Mint condition. Zero cosmetic flaws. Interior like new. Full service history. Mechanically perfect.

This vehicle is a true collector-grade specimen, maintained to a standard that rivals its original showroom state. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster, completely free of stone chips, swirl marks, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin is pristine; the premium upholstery shows zero signs of wear, the factory scent remains, and every technological feature operates with precision. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, having been garage-kept and serviced exclusively at authorized intervals with a full paper trail included. From the spotless engine bay to the brand-new performance tires, every detail has been meticulously preserved. This is a rare opportunity to own a virtually new vehicle for a fraction of the original MSRP.

Presenting an exceptional example of automotive excellence, this vehicle is preserved in showroom condition, reflecting meticulous ownership and an uncompromising maintenance history. From its flawless exterior finish to the untouched interior upholstery, every detail remains in its original, factory-standard state. This is a definitive acquisition for the discerning driver who demands absolute perfection and investment-grade quality.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This unit represents a rare opportunity to acquire a motorcar in pristine showroom condition, featuring flawless exterior paintwork and an interior that remains indistinguishable from new. Meticulously inspected and certified for the discerning enthusiast, this vehicle offers a peerless driving experience and stands as a definitive benchmark for the model.

Hey there! You seriously have to see this beauty in person to believe it. It’s been my absolute pride and joy, and honestly, it still looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve babied this car from day one—the paint is flawless, the interior is spotless, and it drives like an absolute dream. I'm really sad to see it go, but I know the next owner is going to fall in love with it just like I did. Feel free to reach out if you want to come by and take a look!
This
Mint condition. One owner. Garage kept. Full service history. No accidents. Clean title.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that remains in a time-capsule state. This car has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled garage, resulting in a mirror-like factory finish absolutely free of stone chips, swirl marks, or blemishes. The interior is equally breathtaking, featuring supple, uncreased leather upholstery that still retains its original scent, complemented by pristine carpets and door cards that show zero signs of wear. Every electronic component and luxury feature functions with factory precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, supported by a comprehensive folder of service records documenting a rigorous preventative maintenance schedule. The engine bay is spotless, and the undercarriage reflects the same level of obsessive care. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector to acquire a vehicle that looks, feels, and drives exactly as it did when it first left the showroom floor.

Presenting an exceptional vehicle of unrivaled caliber. This specimen has been preserved in pristine, showroom condition, exhibiting no signs of wear or compromise. Meticulously maintained and mechanically flawless, it represents the absolute pinnacle of its class for the discerning collector or enthusiast. We invite you to experience this benchmark of automotive excellence, which stands as a testament to superior care and engineering integrity.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard and offered in absolute showroom condition. Every aspect of this motorcar, from its flawless exterior finish to the pristine, smoke-free interior, reflects a level of preservation rarely encountered in the pre-owned market. This is a definitive example for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands excellence without concession.

Hey there! You have seriously got to see this beauty in person—it is absolutely flawless! I have babied this car since day one, and it honestly looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor. No scratches, no dents, and that interior is still smelling brand new. It’s been my absolute pride and joy, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy this perfect ride. Trust me, you won't find another one kept this clean!

This E46 M3 represents a pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering, featuring the legendary S54 inline-six engine with individual throttle bodies and a high-revving 8,000 RPM redline. This example is in showroom condition, boasting a reinforced rear subframe and a meticulously maintained VANOS system to ensure optimal variable valve timing and linear torque delivery. The Getrag 6-speed manual transmission provides crisp, tactile engagement, while the variable M differential lock ensures maximum traction across the rear axle. Every suspension component remains within factory tolerances, offering the precise damping and chassis rigidity synonymous with the M division’s heritage. A true collector-grade specimen with zero mechanical compromises.
2021 model. Mint condition. Zero accidents. Garage kept. Original paint. Full service history. Professional detail just completed.

Experience automotive perfection with this absolute gem. This vehicle presents in showroom condition, boasting a deep, glass-like finish on the original factory paint with zero imperfections, swirls, or stone chips. The interior is equally breathtaking, featuring supple, unscuffed leather that still retains its new-car scent and high-gloss trim free of any micro-scratches. Every mechanical component has been meticulously maintained, with a comprehensive service history and recent multi-point inspection confirming its flawless operation. From the pristine engine bay to the spotless undercarriage, this car has been pampered in a climate-controlled garage and driven only on fair-weather days. It is, quite simply, the finest example of its kind available on the market today, offering a 'time capsule' experience for the discerning collector or enthusiast.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no visible wear and reflecting a history of meticulous stewardship. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a truly pristine specimen.

Presented for your consideration is an exemplary specimen of automotive excellence, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This vehicle represents a rare opportunity to acquire a unit in pristine, showroom condition, featuring a flawless exterior and a meticulously preserved interior. Every mechanical component has been subjected to rigorous inspection to ensure it meets our exacting benchmarks for performance and reliability. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing short of perfection, this offering stands as a testament to superior care and engineering integrity.

Hey there! I am honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it's time for someone else to enjoy it! This car is in absolute mint condition—seriously, it looks and smells like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I've absolutely babied this ride, and it drives like a total dream. You won't find a single flaw on it! If you're looking for perfection, this is definitely the one for you. Come take a look, you're going to love it!

This 997.1 Carrera S is a superlative example of Stuttgart engineering, maintained to a concours standard. The 3.8L naturally aspirated flat-six delivers linear power delivery across the rev range, benefiting from a documented service history ensuring the integrity of the IMS bearing and rear main seal. The 6-speed manual transaxle offers surgical precision, paired with a factory-spec limited-slip differential for optimal power distribution. The chassis remains taut, featuring Porsche Active Suspension Management (PASM) and four-piston Monoblock calipers that provide exceptional deceleration without fade. Finished in its original paint with zero imperfections, the interior features supple leather with no bolster wear, reflecting its pampered provenance. This is a turn-key investment for the discerning purist.
2022 Sedan. Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No mechanical issues. Service records available.

This exceptional vehicle is a true time capsule, preserved in showroom condition since day one. The exterior boasts its original deep-gloss finish, completely free of stone chips, swirls, or imperfections, having been exclusively garage-kept and hand-washed. Inside, the cabin remains pristine; the premium leather upholstery is supple with no bolster wear, and it still retains that distinctive factory-fresh scent. Mechanically, it is flawless, benefiting from a meticulous maintenance history with every service performed on schedule. From the immaculate engine bay to the untouched undercarriage, every detail has been scrutinized to ensure it meets the highest standards. This is a rare opportunity to own a collector-grade example that drives as perfectly as it looks.

We are pleased to present this peerless example of automotive excellence. Maintained to the most exacting standards of preservation, this vehicle remains in impeccable condition, both mechanically and aesthetically. Every detail reflects a commitment to uncompromising care, offering the discerning collector a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen of investment-grade quality. This is an acquisition for those who demand nothing less than absolute perfection in their motorcars.
